name: taskbari
description: Load VSCode Tasks into Status Bar with category grouping support.

untrustedWorkspaces.description: Tasks are disabled in Restricted Mode.

commands.title: TaskBari: Run All Tasks in Group

tasks.statusbar.default.hide.description: Hide all task buttons from the status bar by default.

tasks.statusbar.default.color.description: Default foreground color for status bar task buttons (hex or ThemeColor).

tasks.statusbar.limit.description: Maximum number of task buttons visible on the status bar. Overflow tasks move to the picker.

tasks.statusbar.select.label.description: Label for the overflow picker button when the task limit is exceeded.

tasks.statusbar.select.color.description: Foreground color for the overflow picker button (hex or ThemeColor).

tasks.statusbar.groups.showTaskCount.description: Show the number of tasks in a group on the status bar button, e.g. $(tools) Build (3).

tasks.statusbar.groups.sortAlphabeticall.description: Sort tasks alphabetically inside group QuickPick menus.
